summary: The legal input domain has eleven values and every execution examines at most the 1024 four-hour/six-minute LED masks, so asymptotic runtime scaling is not defined for this contract.

workload_bound.source_constraint: turned_on is an integer from 0 through 10

replacement_checks.evidence: Four hour LEDs and six minute LEDs produce exactly 2^10 possible masks.
The certificate regression evaluates every turned_on value from 0 through 10 against a direct clock enumeration.
